programme.title: Truth & Lies
programme.desc: In the battle between truth and lies, money plays a decisive role. Nothing seems to be safe from the power of money and the influence of those who possess it.

programme.title: Greatest Prison Escapes With Billy Hayes
programme.desc: Using homemade instruments to carve a hole in the roof after climbing prison pipes, eight inmates escaped from a New Mexico detention centre in 2008.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones explores the turbulent history of Carrickfergus, one of the most ancient castles in Northern Ireland and a stronghold that holds the key to understanding the tempestuous relationship between Britain and Ireland.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Edinburgh's handsome hilltop bastion is Scotland's most popular paid tourist attraction. With a slew of sieges to its name, it is no surprise that the site boasts some formidable defences, and Dan puts one heavy duty cannon through its paces.

programme.title: Britain's Secret Islands
programme.desc: Join a voyage to Farne Islands, home to seals and seabirds, early Christian communities and one of the first landing sites for the terrifying Viking raiders.

programme.title: Britain's Secret Islands
programme.desc: A journey to some of Britain's least known islands, exploring the wildlife of these regions, meeting the people that live there, and exploring the history and culture of these areas.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Ancient Dead
programme.desc: To ensure body and spirit remain everlasting, the ancient Egyptians developed elaborate rituals, massive tombs, and even magic incantations to entomb their remains; when laying bodies to rest, the Romans were all about processional pomp and grandeur.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Ancient Dead
programme.desc: A mysterious well filled with bones reveals a strange practice in ancient Persia. Archaeologists digging in Mongolia uncover a 2000-year-old textile that holds the key to the mystery of an elixira. In Sichuan, China, hanging coffins are discovered.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice discovers the well-preserved writing tablets, swords and domestic items left by Romans at Vindolanda during a time of British rebellion. On the Scottish island of Iona, there are traces of a long-lost monastery and pilgrimage site that was originally built by the legendary Saint Columba, and has been compared to Jerusalem. In the east of Scotland, a weapons hoard belonging to a wealthy Bronze Age warrior is unearthed.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: In this special, Professor Alice Roberts reveals the forgotten story of the Roman Army's secret weapon in Britain - their cavalry. These fearsome horsemen were the key to defending Britain's most famous Roman monument fortification, Hadrian's Wall.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Edinburgh's handsome hilltop bastion is Scotland's most popular paid tourist attraction. With a slew of sieges to its name, it is no surprise that the site boasts some formidable defences, and Dan puts one heavy duty cannon through its paces.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones explores the history of Cardiff castle over more than 2,000 years and reveals how it became transformed from a strategically important Roman and Norman stronghold to a lavish fairy-tale Victorian home.

programme.title: Britain's Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: Alice tells the story of Norman England by studying the history of Winchester, Britain's most Norman city. Alice attempts to storm a castle in chain mail, investigates the origins of modern surgery and tucks in to an appetising eel pie.

programme.title: Britain's Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: In Norwich, the UK's most Tudor city, Professor Alice Roberts learns about religious intolerance, uncovers the Norwich FC canary's origins and experiences humiliating Tudor justice.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson visits Sherwood Forest and the Peak District as he sets out to discover the real King John.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson hikes 45 miles through the Weald in Kent and the Downs of East Sussex to discover the area's rich and surprising Tudor heritage. At the impressively preserved Penshurst Place, author Philippa Gregory helps Tony relish the fate of the Grand Duke of Buckingham at the hands of the young Henry VIII. Tony finishes in Lewes, where he relives one of the more brutal monastic dissolutions.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Dr Alice Roberts follows an entire year of British archaeology, joining up the results of digs and investigations the length of the country. The results are astonishing, and sometimes disturbing. Roman finds include the mystery of 97 babies murdered by the Thames, a fabulous Roman coin hoard found in Somerset and a man buried on a layer of dead animals.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: In Norfolk, flint tools unearthed recently push the earliest human occupation back by 200,000 years, to around one million years ago. In Orkney an early farm yields glimpses of our ancestors' earliest religious beliefs and customs.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Ancient Dead
programme.desc: Explorers uncover one of the largest Incan burial sites at Ancon on the Peruvian coast. It may be proof that the Chacoans were a matriarchal society.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Ancient Dead
programme.desc: In 1928, an earthquake shift uncovers a row of painted warriors: seven-foot statues encasing mummies from an ancient civilisation; curious bone arrangements in Winterborne are somehow linked to intermingled ashes from dig sites in Slovenia.

programme.title: Ghost Ships
programme.desc: Marrs Island, Nova Scotia was the site of one of the worst civilian maritime disasters in history, with more than 550 casualties. The team is diving in to search for answers to figure out how this tragic accident came to be.

programme.title: Ghost Ships
programme.desc: For more than 200 years, tales of a Phantom Ship have surrounded the waters of Pictou, Nova Scotia: a mysterious ship engulfs in flames and suddenly vanishes. Recently, a charred wooden wreck was discovered in the middle of Pictou Harbour.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson travels along the wonderful seascapes of the North Norfolk coast and through one of the least developed spots in the country.

programme.title: Weird Britain
programme.desc: Andy heads to the home of palaeontology on the Jurassic Coast and braves the collapsing cliffs of Lyme Regis to bring back one of its many fossils.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice discovers the well-preserved writing tablets, swords and domestic items left by Romans at Vindolanda during a time of British rebellion. On the Scottish island of Iona, there are traces of a long-lost monastery and pilgrimage site that was originally built by the legendary Saint Columba, and has been compared to Jerusalem. In the east of Scotland, a weapons hoard belonging to a wealthy Bronze Age warrior is unearthed.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: In this special, Professor Alice Roberts reveals the forgotten story of the Roman Army's secret weapon in Britain - their cavalry. These fearsome horsemen were the key to defending Britain's most famous Roman monument fortification, Hadrian's Wall.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Ancient Dead
programme.desc: Explorers uncover one of the largest Incan burial sites at Ancon on the Peruvian coast. It may be proof that the Chacoans were a matriarchal society.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Lucy talks to a pastor and his wife who plan to build their dream eco house in Brompton in Kent. Meanwhile, Martin meets a first-time developer in Wolverhampton, and Dion looks at a huge building which already comes with a tenanted flat and a hair salon in Newcastle-under-Lyme.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A commercial and residential building in Beeston in Nottinghamshire, a four-storey house in East Dulwich in London and a flat in Godalming in Surrey are all given high-end makeovers. Will the developers, who all bought at auction, make a profit?

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A 1930s semi in Hatfield in Hertforshire, a flat in Croydon and a workshop and land in Heanor in Derbyshire are sold at auction. Martin, Lucy and Dion meet the owners and hear their plans to make money from their bricks and mortar.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A mum and dad buy a piece of land in Stevenage in Hertfordshire in the hope of developing a pair of houses for their children, a couple who buy a top-floor flat in Motherwell in Scotland want to make a profit on the rent, and two young brothers buy a run-down house in South Normanton.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A bungalow in Langton Green in Kent is given a high-end refurbishment and extension, a father-and-son team cleverly refigure the existing space in a terraced house in Stoke-on-Trent, and two lifelong friends have high hopes for a piece of land they buy behind a house they already own in Northwood in Middlesex.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A 1930s semi in Leamington Spa in Warwickshire, a terraced house in London's Plumstead and a workshop on the Isle of Sheppey in Kent are all sold under the hammer. Martin Roberts, Lucy Alexander and Dion Dublin hear about the plans for the three properties.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts catches up on ambitious plans to redevelop the site of a former school in Ebbw Vale in Wales, while Dion Dublin talks to a first-time developer planning to extend up and out at a semi in Bloxwich in the West Midlands.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A flat in Sutton in London, a studio apartment in Chatham in Kent and a terraced house in Middlesbrough are all sold under the hammer. Martin, Lucy and Dion meet the new owners.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A bungalow in Biggin Hill with huge potential, a centuries-old cottage in a beautiful part of Devon and an end terrace crying out for an upstairs bathroom are all sold under the hammer. Martin, Lucy and Dion meet the new owners and hear their plans.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martel Maxwell joins the team, and looks at an old mews house in an historic part of Litchfield in Staffordshire, while Martin Roberts assesses the potential of a bungalow in Hanley in Stoke-on-Trent.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martel Maxwell looks at a large terraced house in Dover in Kent with bags of potential. Martin Roberts is in Camborne in Cornwall viewing a house with lots of issues. Dion Dublin meets a couple who bought a flat in Woodford Green in Essex.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martel Maxwell is in Gillingham in Kent meeting a couple embarking on their first renovation development, Martin Roberts talks to a man with ambitious plans for a house in London's Chingford, and Dion Dublin looks round a semi in Wolverhampton.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martel Maxwell hears development plans for a two-bedroom flat in Godalming in Surrey, Martin Roberts looks at a house in a terrible state of repair in Telford in Shropshire, and Dion Dublin sizes up the work needing to be done at a terraced house in Smethwick in the West Midlands.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A flat with great sea views in Margate in Kent, a bungalow in Whaley Thorns in Nottinghamshire and an end terrace in Longbridge in Birmingham are all sold under the hammer.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A listed building in Brentwood in Essex dating back to the 16th-century is sold under the hammer, along with a flat in Halesowen in Birmingham and an end terrace in Northwood in Stoke-on-Trent.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A large semi in New Barnet in London is bought as an ambitious project to turn into a family home, a family do up a semi in Dover in Kent to make a profit, and two friends club together to try their hand at refurbishing a terraced house in Derby.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A large Victorian semi packed full of original features in Dresden in Stoke-on-Trent, a two-bed semi in Croydon in London and some public loos in Kincardine in Fife are sold at auction. Martin, Dion and Martel meet the new owners and hear their plans for their auction buys.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A huge 1930s house in Kidderminster in Worcestershire, a purpose-built flat in a 1980s block in Wembley in North London, and a substantial Victorian semi in Burslem in Staffordshire are sold at auction.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A mid-terrace house with period features in Forest Gate in London, a house with a stream but close to a railway line in Handsacre in Staffordshire, and a large three-storey property in Plymouth are all sold at auction.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A third-floor flat in Walworth in London, a piece of land in Derbyshire's Chesterfield, and a block of flats in Hengoed in Mid Glamorgan are all sold under the hammer.

programme.desc: Martel Maxwell visits a house in Guildford, Martin Roberts falls in love with a Grade II-listed house in Torquay in Devon, and Dion Dublin is in Barry in Wales assessing all the work needed on a mid-terrace house. Will the developers' plans run smoothly?

programme.desc: A teenage couple goes on the run after an attack on the boy's sister. A search leads officers to the girl's grandparents' home, where they find the bodies of the elderly couple and uncover a fantasy killing concocted by the psychopathic lovers.

programme.title: Nightmare in Suburbia

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Angela Taylor hated her estranged husband Bill because he would not grant her a divorce, so she and her lover take matters into their own hands.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Scott Gellatly swept neighbour Lori Jackson off her feet. But her mother Merry had doubts about Scott. He controlled where Lori went, and who she spoke to. So when things turned violent, it wasn't just Lori in the firing line.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Rhys Hancock was a respected school head, his wife Helen a much-loved PE teacher. When their marriage failed she found love with Martin Griffiths. But Rhys made the choice that ending his wife's happiness would be worth the long prison sentence.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath

As Vera and her team investigate what happened to the child, they unravel a web of deadly secrets and discover a murderous sequence of events set in motion by power, money and a mother's love. Although she is usually awkward and uninterested around children, Vera finds a kindred spirit in the boy.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When former vice cop Frank McCallum is discovered beaten to death in an underpass, DS Ronnie Brooks and DS Matt Devlin find their investigation going in unexpected directions. There are more surprises in store for Crown Prosecutors James Steel and Alesha Phillips when the accused argues that they acted in self defence. What really happened to McCallum?

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: DS Ronnie Brooks and DS Matt Devlin are forced to reopen a contentious murder case, and their investigations threaten to unravel James Steel's prosecution of Luke Slade eight years before. Slade, who has been studying law during his time in prison, is given leave to appeal. When he opts to represent himself in court, the case becomes less of a legal appeal and more of a personal vendetta between Slade and Steel.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: When Rachel receives an email containing video footage of Hudson's murder, it becomes clear that the rules of the game have changed and her own safety is in question.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: As the team makes a significant breakthrough, Rachel's position as acting DI is in jeopardy, and both Scott and Bailey have big decisions to make about their futures.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

Can the detectives uncover the truth about the DeQuettevilles and the ghostly rider in order to prevent more murders?

programme.title: Polar Storm
programme.desc: When a large comet fragment collides with the Earth, Dr James Mayfield discovers that the planet's magnetic poles have shifted by 10 degrees, with catastrophic consequences for the future of all mankind. With the lives of his beloved wife and teenage son on the line, the only way James can save his family - and the world - is to try to realign the Earth's axis with strategically placed nuclear weapons.

programme.title: When Worlds Collide
programme.desc: As a new star and planet hurtle towards the Earth, a small group of survivalists frantically work to complete the rocket which will take them to their new home.

programme.title: The Arrival
programme.desc: Zane Zaminski is a radio astronomer who believes he has heard an extra-terrestrial signal, but whose discovery is deemed worthless by his boss. Then his research division is closed down due to government cutbacks and he is given the sack. Undeterred, Zane establishes a makeshift radio telescope within his own home and joins forces with fellow scientist Ilana Green to find out more about this alien lifeforce.

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: The crew of the USS Enterprise are forced to put well-earned holiday plans on hold. After a strenuous mission, Captain Kirk receives orders to investigate the disappearance of a Vulcan-manned spaceship in the solar system of Gamma VII A.

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: The hunters research a Norwich newspaper man with a £30,000 pension, and a Glaswegian author who had lost all contact with his family.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to Staffordshire to meet petrolhead Martin, who's also the organiser of a local music festival.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The show returns as four sets of B&B owners take it in turns to host each other, before deciding which of their establishments provides the best value for money. The first B&B of the week is luxury weight-loss and detox retreat Slimmeria, owned by Galia and Michael Grainger. Health fanatic Galia's mission is to spread the Slimmeria message.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Jan and William Cheeseman have achieved a Five Star Gold rating at 38 St Giles in Norwich, but the pursuit of perfection has been known to take its toll on this volatile pair. Things are anything but perfect for Galia when she arrives. Unhappy with her room due to the road noise, she asks to be moved. Luckily, a day on the race track gives Galia something to smile about as she has the ride of her life.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Fun-loving Ann and Bill host at their four-star B&B in Bude, North Cornwall. On arrival, Galia immediately complains about the lack of sea view, while Diane and Max query the luxury description of the premises. There's an indulgent Cornish cream tea, a Cornish stick dance, a drink in Ann and Bill's garden shed, and `weekday caviar' for brekkie.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Hosts at Ombersley Bed & Breakfast are village bakers Diane and Max Seivewright. On arrival, Ann and Bill conduct a dust hunt in their room. Jan and William are left speechless by the outdated rooms, and Galia finds the journey across the hall for conveniences, inconvenient. Galia and Ann bicker over gluten-free bread and hand washing, and Ann is underwhelmed by her eggs at breakfast and later she finds herself in tears.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's the final day and the B&B hosts gather to find out how much they've been paid and who is taking the title of best value for money B&B. Galia faces some harsh feedback and questions the criticism over Slimmeria's rules and regulations. Tensions rise again between Galia and Ann and Bill, while Diane and Max from Ombersley feel stabbed in the back, especially by Ann and Bill's feedback, and are looking for some answers.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: This week's competition is in Bournemouth, where the first host is 38-year-old bar manager and musician Adie, who hopes to hit the right notes by ensuring his night of laid back fun is full of music and laughter.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: This week's competition is in Bournemouth, where the second host is aristocratic vet Sir Henry, who plans to charm his way to the prize by hosting an evening of relaxed dining.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Bournemouth, country tweed-loving Pippa plans a fishy evening, with every course inspired by fish. After an evening of finery with Sir Henry and Adie's trumptastic night, Pippa is determined to impress.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Fourth to host in Bournemouth is spiritual student Simone, who hopes to wow her guests with a spicy Bajan inspired menu.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the last night in Bournemouth, flamboyant charity manager Jacqueline hopes that Michelin star-style food will win her the prize.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Tricia and her daughter Jess welcome their rivals to St Hilary Guest House in Llandudno. There are plumbing issues and surprising revelations, and cooking methods are questioned.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: At The Falcon Retreat in Godreaman, some guests are wowed by the views, but at breakfast the food doesn't sit well with everyone and some feedback leaves the hosts sharpening their talons.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: For the third visit of the week the group head to The Crown Inn in Grewelthorpe, where there's a creepy-crawly concern, and some sleep scores leave the hosts tossing and turning.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to In the Stix Glamping in Greetham, Rutland, but one guest refuses to give it a go before even setting foot on site.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's the final day of the competition and it is time for the B&B'ers to settle some scores. After dramatic discoveries and cutting comments, the payments are revealed and the winner is announced.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp searches for a family home around Hove on the south coast for Duncan, Anna and their three young daughters who have returned from seven years in Switzerland. Phil Spencer helps Mick and Bernie, who are looking to downsize.

programme.title: PopMaster TV
programme.desc: Ken Bruce hosts as players face their last chance to secure a place in the Grand Final. But who has the best pop knowledge and will be able to move forward?

programme.desc: For four seasons fans of `Teen Mom' watched Farrah, Maci, Amber and Catelynn face multiple challenges in their first years of motherhood, including such things as graduating from high school, relationships, getting jobs, beginning college and moving out on their own. Oh, and raising their first child. Now the original girls - hence, the `OG' in the revived series title - return to reveal the challenges of raising children on camera, and how life in the public eye has shaped them as parents and people. It's an unprecedented view of young mothers facing the responsibilities of parenthood as their children enter kindergarten, start little league and reach other milestones of youth.

programme.desc: Naïve suburbanite Jake Farrell answers questions about family, the future and Stevenage.

programme.title: Kiri Pritchard McLean: Hysterical Woman
programme.desc: Welsh-born comedian Kiri Pritchard-McLean asks "Why is 'female' treated as a genre?"

programme.title: Andy Field: The Andy Field Experience
programme.desc: Andy Field puts on a traditional, gag-lead stand-up show with his own iconic charm.

programme.title: Lost Voice Guy: I'm Only in it for Parking
programme.desc: A debut hour of cutting edge material combines the political and personal with razor-sharp observations about disability and daily life.

programme.title: Max & Ivan: The End
programme.desc: Welcome to Sudley-on-Sea. Take a look around. You don't have long. Seriously. Max and Ivan tell an epic narrative sketch comedy tale about the hopes, fears and dreams of a doomed town.

programme.title: Red Richardson: At the Rich Mix
programme.desc: Standup comedian Red Richardson performs at Rich Mix in London on 16 October 2020.

programme.title: David Crowe: White Bread
programme.desc: David Crowe is a 20 year veteran of the comedy stage. He won both the Seattle and San Francisco Comedy Competitions and has performed for a US President.

programme.title: Mike P. Burton: I Can Get Whiter
programme.desc: Mike Burton delivers his comedy with high energy, great storytelling, and hilarious facial expressions.

programme.title: Johnny Beehner: The Flamingo Special
programme.desc: Johnny Beehner has everything people want from a comic: He's silly, he's likeable, and he's fun.

programme.title: Moody McCarthy: The Good Jew
programme.desc: Comedian Moody McCarthy performs in front of a live audience.

programme.title: Mike Toomey: Welcome to My World
programme.desc: Mike Toomey has been a favorite at comedy clubs and special events since 1982.

programme.title: Lamuweri Guluka: The First Option
programme.desc: As a nerdy, suburban, black male, Lamuweri has a unique comedic perspective that audiences love.

programme.title: Lee Hardin: Not Quite A Grown Up
programme.desc: Lee Hardin is known for making bad decisions and his love for Taco Bell.

programme.title: Mike Guido: Sanity Optional
programme.desc: Comedian Mike Guido performs a standup show in front of a live audience.

programme.title: Kelly Terranova: A Man Named Kelly
programme.desc: Kelly Terranova entertains with expressive observational humor.

programme.title: Mike Siegel: Have Jokes, Will Travel
programme.desc: Stand-up comedian, TV host and actor Mike Siegel performs different acts and entertains with hilarious takes on numerous subjects.

programme.title: Keith Barany: Dude... Seriously?
programme.desc: There's no doubt Keith Barany delivers the laughs, every single time he hits the stage. As a tested and veteran touring pro, Keith could explain for hours about the subtle skill set he employs to make the laughs happen.

programme.title: Mike Siegel: Have Jokes, Will Travel
programme.desc: Stand-up comedian, TV host and actor Mike Siegel performs different acts and entertains with hilarious takes on numerous subjects.

programme.title: Dan Megini: Been There, DUMB that!
programme.desc: Comedian Dan Megini performs a standup set.

programme.title: Chris Strait: Laugh Till You Run Out of Air
programme.desc: No funny topic is off-limits for this California native, but he's just telling his story.

programme.title: Karen Mills: Pink Pants
programme.desc: Karen Mills has made a career out of making people laugh; she's been a nationally touring comedian for 25 years.

programme.title: Joey ILO: Just Work With What You Got
programme.desc: Joey ILO takes to the stage to cracks joke with his iconic relatable style.

programme.title: Jimmy Della Valle: Famous Nobody
programme.desc: Jimmy delivers hilarious stories and one-liners from his unique, streetwise point of view.

programme.title: Fred Klett: One of Ten
programme.desc: Fred Klett showing off his clean comedy trademark, appealing to families with members of all ages with material taken from his experiences growing up in a large Christian family.

programme.title: Rex Havens: Women and Children First
programme.desc: Rex has been delighting comedy audiences for 20 years, in world-famous comedy clubs like The Improv, Catch-A-Rising Star, Funny Bones and Zanies, on television for Showtime, Comedy Central and Comic Relief, on radio with Bob & Tom and NPR, cruise ships worldwide, and corporate clients including GM, American Express, Texaco, 3M, Coca-Cola, IBM, Toshiba.

programme.title: Warren B. Hall: Mostly Kid Stuff
programme.desc: Simply put, Warren B Hall is not what the viewer is expecting. He purposely avoids using the white vs black angle done by many mainstream black comedians.

programme.title: Max & Ivan: Holmes & Watson
programme.desc: The world's greatest detective tackles Chicago's murky underworld. A prohibition-era tale of revenge, whisky and javelins.

programme.title: Juliette Burton: Defined
programme.desc: Juliette Burton goes on her journey of self discovery (and mental health recovery) in asking: why can't we be everything at once?

programme.title: Andrea Hubert: Week
programme.desc: Hubert's debut show is a candid, upfront hour of observational comedy with her struggles with mental health in the foreground from the off.

programme.title: Jake Donaldson: Neurotica
programme.desc: Jake Donaldson is a male comedian who just wants to be a good feminist, but he grew up in the 90s and has a `proper man' for a dad, so now he feels bad about not being able to put up a shelf.

programme.title: Njambi McGrath: Breaking Black
programme.desc: Njambi McGrath offers acerbic anecdotes about life in Kenya, living in a white neighbourhood, why immigrants are attracted to the UK, and how they thrive amongst certain hostilities.

programme.title: Becky Brunning: Bloom
programme.desc: Bright, breezy and a breath of fresh air, Becky's feel good story-telling on love, sexuality, feminism, and embarrassing dads is all charm.

programme.title: Holly Burn: The Best of The Burn
programme.desc: Daredevil absurdist Holly Burn creates a whole host of obscure characters and semi-reckless stunts.

programme.title: Jenna Kim Jones: Fun to Hug
programme.desc: Jenna Kim Jones is a comedian known for her strong personality and little to no upper body strength. She recently came to grips with the fact that she will never be able to do a pull up and earn her 4th grade Presidential Fitness Award though she plans to exploit this limitation into a book or reality television deal.

programme.desc: The Chipmunks and Chipettes compete in a dodgeball tournament but no-one expects Theo to be their secret weapon. The Chipmunks find a shack that magically fills with toys and games, but is it magic or something more sinister.

programme.title: Open Season: Call of Nature
programme.sub-title: Camp Palace; Will the Real McSquizzy Please Stand Up?
programme.desc: The Pets have tricked the camp in 'Camp Palace', then in 'Will the Real McSquizzy Please Stand Up?', A bump on the head turns McSquizzy into a kinder squirrel.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Gary is given a set of limbs to keep up with SpongeBob, but soon makes his owner look sluggish by comparison. Plankton practises ruling the world by shrinking himself down and declaring himself king of SpongeBob's aquarium.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.sub-title: The Meatball of Canyon Valley; Sticky Fingers
programme.desc: When Halmoni chooses Jack over Lil to be her Trot dance competition partner, jealous Lil seeks revenge; Min asks Jack to run a simple errand, but Charlie the gibbon intervenes, sending Jack and Lil chasing after him.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: The boy's imaginations run wild when Dave disappears; when they finally find him, they're convinced he's a zombie; Alvin tries to convince Dave that he's being hunted by a flying beast.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Alvin invites Dave's old high school rival to an elaborate dinner to prove to him that Dave is a huge success. The Chipmunks can't wait to go on a World tour until Theodore and Alvin realise what they'll be leaving behind.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Mikey and Genghis Frog are sent into the storm on a supply run to the local market when they encounter the electrifying Lee The Eeel; now Mikey has to step up and be a leader.

programme.title: Sonic Prime
programme.desc: Sonic meets his match in Chaos Sonic, a robot version of himself designed to never fail. Meanwhile, the Chaos Council decides to expand their empire.

programme.title: Sonic Prime
programme.desc: The key to reassembling the Paradox Prism lies in one of the Shatterspaces. But Nine and Sonic must find a portal to safely transport the Shards there.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: Jack gets his first phone and immediately sends the wrong text to Will, forcing the kids to do whatever it takes to delete it. When the last Hallasand goes missing, fingers point to Halmoni and only a family tribunal will set the record straight.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: LAD has a sleepover and in an effort to join in, Jack ends up making a promise that turns their night upside down. When Will's parents visit Canyon Valley, news of the sale of their bee farm sends the family into a big, honeying.

programme.title: Open Season: Call of Nature
programme.desc: The discovery of a mysterious map convinces the campers a treasure is buried on a nearby island and they set off to look for it.

programme.title: Open Season: Call of Nature
programme.sub-title: Hunter Gatherers; There's No E in Team
programme.desc: A dog threatens to give the camp's location away in 'Hunter Gatherers', then in 'There's No E in Team', Elliot is on the hunt for a 'Golden Ticket.'

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob wants to be the first sponge to dive all the way up to the surface of the ocean. When SpongeBob and Squidward accidentally let Plankton steal the secret formula, it's up to them to steal it back.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Sandy have to collect Krabby Patty ingredients, but Plankton is following their every step. When The Krusty Krab runs out of mustard, Mr. Krabs sends SpongeBob, Patrick and Squidward to dig up some more.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Alvin helps the mathletes stand up to the school bullies, but in the process they become bullies themselves; Alvin befriends a new student, but Theodore learns something surprising about him.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Everyone thinks Simon has lost his mind after he fails a school test and moves into a tree for some alone time. Alvin worries about his bad report card and does everything he can to intercept the mail before Dave sees it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr Krabs hires Squidward to babysit Pearl for the night, but she just wants to sneak out to a cool teen party. After spilling a milkshake during a delivery, SpongeBob vows to return and clean the entire building.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton tells Patrick he's his conscience so he can convince the wooden-headed star to steal him a Krabby Patty. When Mr Krabs puts in an open kitchen, SpongeBob gets stage fright and has to invent a new persona.

programme.sub-title: Playing Dead; Beef in the Mess Hall

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks

programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick search for a legendary drain on the ocean floor in `The Main Drain', and then in `Sponge-Cano', Squidward's complaints trigger a volcanic eruption.

programme.desc: The team visit Beamish in County Durham to explore how the railway companies soon recognised that there was money to be made in moving people, rather than just stone, coal and iron. programme.title: Shed & Buried
programme.desc: Series in which Henry Cole and Sam Lovegrove nose around people's sheds and garages in search or automotive bargains. programme.title: Shed & Buried
programme.desc: Series in which Henry Cole and Sam Lovegrove nose around people's sheds and garages in search or automotive bargains. Today, Henry and Sam discover a collection of motorbikes on Bodmin Moor accumulated over 25 years. They snap up a Suzuki B120 but selling it on to Henry's mate means they hardly make any money on it. Later, in Redruth, the pair come across Harry Potter's Ford Anglia. They bid for it and take it home where a buyer is not far away - their soundman Tommy wants it.

programme.desc: Henry Cole and friends Fuzz Townshend and Guy Willison hit the road to find, buy and make a profit from the UK's abandoned automotive gems.

programme.title: The Repair Shop

programme.desc: Steph becomes puppet master as she tours the Scottish Borders in pursuit of profits but Phil is distracted by the local cuisine. At the end of the first day's shopping all he's bought is some lunch.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House
programme.sub-title: Sign Of True Love Goes To Auction
programme.desc: Auctioneer Angus Ashworth and his team are called out to people's homes with a mission to sift through a lifetime of possessions and find forgotten treasures that can be sold at auction.

programme.title: Angus Ashworth: Yorkshire Heritage Hero
programme.desc: Auctioneer Angus Ashworth is heading to some of Yorkshire's big country houses in a bid to help save and protect these northern gems for the future.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Art conservator Lucia Scalisi revives an oil painting of a mining scene, created by an amateur artist in the 1960s. It is a delicate task for Lucia as she cleans away the dirty surface to reveal the stunning scene underneath. Owner Gwyn is overwhelmed when she returns to the barn to see her miner father's artwork restored to its full glory.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.sub-title: The Aussie Outback; How the World's Biggest Wave Machine is Used; Finest Handmade Chandeliers
programme.desc: A look at iron mining on an epic scale in the Aussie outback, how the world's biggest wave machine is used for flood defences, and how the finest handmade chandeliers are made.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.sub-title: Oyster Knives; The Lights Transforming the World's Most Popular Sport; Pure Diamonds are Grown
programme.desc: A look at the world's finest oyster knives, the lights transforming the world's most popular sport and how pure diamonds grown in a greenhouse are creating a gemstone revolution.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: How do they make cheddar, the world's most popular cheese? How do they breathe life into Rususci Anne - the plastic woman that teaches CPR?

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: How do Ford produce the ubiquitous white van, the Transit? Plus, how do they ensure the Driza-bone coat lives up to its name?

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike finds what he thinks is the finest-handling front wheel drive car, the Lotus Elan M100. If Ant can revive the engine and suspension, will it make a profit?

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike is excited to pick up one of his favourite types of convertible: the 2000 Porsche 996. With only a few issues, this car will be an absolute steal for him.

programme.title: Shed & Buried
programme.desc: Series in which Henry Cole and Sam Lovegrove nose around people's sheds and garages in search or automotive bargains. Today, in a Cornish surf shack they find a bevy of custom bikes, surf buggies and weird and wonderful objects of all kinds. In Oxfordshire, discoveries include rare motoring memorabilia,1970s kitsch and a fabulous collection of stationary engines. They come, they see, they haggle, they repair and finally sell for a tidy profit.

programme.title: Shed & Buried
programme.desc: Series in which Henry Cole and Sam Lovegrove nose around people's sheds and garages in search or automotive bargains. Today, Henry and Sam discover a collection of motorbikes on Bodmin Moor accumulated over 25 years. They snap up a Suzuki B120 but selling it on to Henry's mate means they hardly make any money on it. Later, in Redruth, the pair come across Harry Potter's Ford Anglia. They bid for it and take it home where a buyer is not far away - their soundman Tommy wants it.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.sub-title: Pipes, Rock Climbing Gear, Leather Bike Saddles, Luxury Sports Cars
programme.desc: Follow the amazing manufacturing processes behind pipes, rock climbing gear, leather bike saddles and luxury sports cars.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: Follow the amazing manufacturing processes behind replica foods, traffic cone dispensers, rocking horses and London taxis.

programme.desc: Tensions rise when Bethany and her brother, who is paying for her gown, can't decide on style. Plus, David wants bride Sian to dress head-to-tie in bling.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programme.desc: Debbie's twins prove hard to please when searching for the perfect dress. And, can Kirstie convince her mum to blow the budget on the dress of her dreams?

programme.sub-title: A Big Personality Looking For A Big Dress

programme.title: Say Yes To The Dress: Lancashire
programme.desc: Jilly is riding to her wedding on a tractor, so her dress must be practical and elegant. Plus, indecisive Faye fears she will make the wrong choice again.

programme.title: Disappeared
programme.desc: Robert doesn't collect his wife from the airport, and his son informs the investigators that he met some unusual men a few days earlier. Find out what made Robert disappear.

programme.title: Judge Rinder's Crime Stories
programme.desc: Examining a devastating murder case of a girl whose younger sister was also dying of terminal cancer, and a story about an unscrupulous gang of puppy traders who were selling sick and dying puppies.

programme.title: Love, Honor, Betray
programme.desc: When Sarah Ripoli was just six years old a terrible event tore her family apart. The discovery of secret writings from beyond the grave helps Sarah to finally understand the shocking truth of what went on between her mum and dad.

programme.title: Disappeared
programme.desc: 19-year-old Logan Schiendelman vanishes after a night out. When authorities find no evidence of foul play, they are forced to examine his family's controversial past.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: The police lack leads after single mum Laura Ackerson leaves for work one morning and never returns, so they turn to surveillance cameras to try to locate her and unearth sinister footage.

programme.title: The Detectives: My Killer Case
programme.desc: Disturbing crimes from across the UK are unpacked and retold in intimate detail through police files, CCTV footage and accounts from those who helped solve them.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: After moving to a remote Colorado town, Ron and Cynthia Phillips and their kids struggle to adjust. But their home videos mask darker impulses that lead to murder.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: In Albuquerque, Mike Snyder starts a family with his partner, capturing it on home video. But after being diagnosed with a serious illness, he vanishes.

programme.title: American Detective With Lt. Joe Kenda
programme.desc: In the Miami suburbs, a hard-working mother from Trinidad vanishes into thin air. Detectives Danny Smith and Jonathan Zeller soon uncover her secrets but then are stalled until they come up with a highly unusual way to smoke out the perpetrator.

programme.title: Judge Rinder's Crime Stories
programme.desc: A family whose lives were destroyed forever, after a mother of two left her children in the care of her ex-husband. A case of fraudulent activity at the hands of a carer, who took advantage of those she was supposed to look after.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: Amy Lord, a 24-year-old former cheerleader, goes missing. CCTV footage from ATMs and outside her home captures when she was taken by her killer.

programme.title: Body Cam
programme.desc: In Florida, a father kidnaps his child. Meanwhile, a Georgia fugitive fires at police, causing neighbourhood panic. Later, in Ohio, a suspect flees into a daycare centre.

programme.title: Body Cam
programme.desc: Raw, intense, and action packed, Body Cam uses body camera footage to show the dangerous, fast-moving situations officers face and the life-or-death decisions they must make in the blink of an eye.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: Playing a cat-and-mouse game, police hunt for the heartless killer of a student.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: The discovery of a burnt body sends police on the hunt for camera footage that may show the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Detectives
programme.desc: Drug trafficking has spawned a violent and deadly criminal underground.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: February 1st 2004. 11-year-old Carlie Brucia disappears while walking home from a friend's house. Police discover security camera footage of her shocking abduction and the enquiry becomes a manhunt. Can surveillance video reveal what happened to her?

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: A woman's lively get-together at her local bar ends with a baffling murder.

programme.title: Disappeared
programme.desc: When transgender teen Sage Smith goes missing, the investigation turns up evidence that forces detectives to look closer into Sage's inner circle.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: On July 5, 2011, a young couple on their way home from a night of birthday celebrations is shot while getting gas; with the killers long since vanished, detectives must rely on the grainy gas station video to unravel a senseless act of evil.

programme.title: The Detectives: My Killer Case
programme.desc: Disturbing crimes from across the UK are unpacked and retold in intimate detail through police files, CCTV footage and accounts from those who helped solve them.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: US Air Force sergeant Nathan Paet and his family appear to live a blissfully normal life, until a horrific attack leads to their destruction.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: In California, an intruder brutally attacks and kills Joan Dawley. Secret home movies uncover a shocking tale of deceit, and a monster lurking behind the scenes.

programme.title: Disappeared
programme.desc: In the years following the disappearance of two sixteen-year-old girls, two serial killers separately confess to the murders. Are they toying with police?

programme.title: Judge Rinder's Crime Stories

programme.title: Murder on CCTV

programme.title: Who Hired the Hitman?

programme.desc: In Danville, Ky., a pawn store robbery leaves three people dead; detectives seek to identify the suspect, and their only lead is a mysterious silver van; using a trail of videos to pursue the elusive vehicle is their only hope of catching a killer.

programme.desc: The next bunch of hopefuls pitch their easels as they bid to paint their way to the semi-finals. Mark Gatiss, Georgina Campbell and Tanni Grey-Thompson strike a pose.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: An amoral antique dealer masquerades as a man of the cloth to secure rock bottom prices in the name of a bogus charity, but his day of atonement may be nigh when he buys a rare item of furniture from an old farmer.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: Old rivalries come to light when a mild-mannered clerk finds employment with the man who was his childhood bully. Tempers eventually boil over when he suspects his wife of infidelity.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A professor (Macdonald Carey) travelling across the country outwits three larcenous hitchhikers.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man (Brian Keith) destined to live in an iron lung fears for his life after learning of his wife's (Joanna Moore) infidelity.

programme.title: Art Traffickers: Treasures Stolen From The Tombs
programme.desc: Through a combination of interviews and studio reconstructions, recount the gripping stories behind those who have excavated and stolen masterpieces.

programme.title: Landscape Artist of the Year
programme.sub-title: Landscape Artist Of The Year: Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Pitching easels and priming canvases to find out who is the Landscape Artist of the Year. Hopeful contestants try to paint their way to a life-changing cash prize in various locations across the country.

programme.title: The Seventies
programme.desc: A dramatic shift of gender roles and the relaxing of censorship creates new artistic and social directions in America.

programme.title: Art Matters
programme.desc: Melvyn Bragg draws on a career spanning more than 60 years, making a rousing case for why the arts matter as he explores his early years and the stories of influential interviewees.

programme.title: Statues Redressed
programme.desc: Extraordinary artists, designers and members of the community come together to dress some of Liverpool's most iconic statues for a unique summer project brought to you by Sky Arts.

programme.title: Blind Eye Artist
programme.desc: After an accident leaves Justin Wadlington blind in his left eye at age 5, he develops a unique artistic ability with no formal art training. Despite growing up without parents, Wadlington begins a journey of ascension to the fine art world.

programme.title: Landscape Artist of the Year
programme.sub-title: Landscape Artist Of The Year: Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Pitching easels and priming canvases to find out who is the Landscape Artist of the Year. Hopeful contestants try to paint their way to a life-changing cash prize in various locations across the country.

programme.title: William Tell
programme.desc: In 14th Century Switzerland, a once peaceful hunter leads his people in rebellion after his family and country are threatened by a tyrannical Austrian King. As the Holy Roman Empire crumbles, the quiet lives of the Swiss peasants are upended.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Remakes
programme.desc: It's time to kick off your Sunday shoes with remakes in this edition of 'The Cinema List'. From 'Footloose' to 'The Italian Job', revisit familiar favourites with a fresh twist.

programme.title: The Shadow's Edge
programme.desc: Macau Police brings a retired tracking expert police officer to help catch a dangerous group of professional thieves.

programme.title: Olympus Has Fallen
programme.desc: America's national security team must rely on a disgraced former guard to save the president after terrorists seize control of the White House, taking the chief of state hostage.

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: Desperate for money to save his sick daughter, Ben Richards joins the top-rated show on television, "The Running Man," a deadly competition where contestants must survive 30 days while being hunted by professional assassins.

programme.title: The Meg
programme.desc: A massive creature attacks a deep-sea submersible, leaving it disabled and trapping the crew at the bottom of the Pacific Ocean. With time running out, rescue diver Jonas Taylor must save the crew and the ocean itself from an unimaginable threat: a 75-foot-long prehistoric shark known as the megalodon.

programme.title: Kong: Skull Island
programme.desc: Scientists, soldiers and adventurers encounter the mighty Kong and other monstrous creatures after travelling to an uncharted island in the Pacific Ocean.

programme.title: Jurassic World Rebirth
programme.desc: Skilled operatives travel to an island research facility to secure life-saving DNA from dinosaurs. As the top-secret mission becomes more and more dangerous, they soon make a sinister, shocking discovery that's been hidden from the world for decades.

programme.title: Bullet Train
programme.desc: Five assassins find themselves on a fast moving bullet train from Tokyo to Morioka with only a few stops in between. They discover their missions are not unrelated to each other.

programme.title: Gladiator II
programme.desc: Lucius must enter the Colosseum after the powerful emperors of Rome conquer his home. With rage in his heart and the future of the empire at stake, he looks to the past to find the strength and honour needed to return the glory of Rome to its people.

programme.title: Olympus Has Fallen
programme.desc: America's national security team must rely on a disgraced former guard to save the president after terrorists seize control of the White House, taking the chief of state hostage.

programme.title: Fuze
programme.desc: London undergoes a citywide evacuation when a World War II bomb is unearthed at a construction site. Amid the escalating chaos, a daring criminal operation is set in motion -- one that uses the evacuation as a cover for a meticulously planned heist.

programme.title: Bad Boys II
programme.desc: Loose-cannon cops Lowrey and Burnett reduce Miami to rubble as they try to stop Cuban and Russian drug smugglers from flooding Florida with ecstasy.

programme.title: Bad Boys II
programme.desc: Loose-cannon cops Lowrey and Burnett reduce Miami to rubble as they try to stop Cuban and Russian drug smugglers from flooding Florida with ecstasy.

programme.title: Police Academy 2: Their First Assignment
programme.desc: Mahoney and friends have graduated from the Police Academy and are issued with their first assignments. As before, their cheerfulness and devotion to duty outweighs any shortcomings, but are they ready to do battle with a band of graffiti daubing terrorists?

programme.title: Seven Psychopaths
programme.desc: A struggling screenwriter finds himself inadvertently entangled in the criminal underworld when his knucklehead friends abduct a mobster's beloved Shih Tzu.

programme.title: Eddington
programme.desc: During the COVID-19 pandemic, a stand-off between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbour is pitted against neighbour in Eddington, N.M.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
programme.desc: The hard-nosed Detroit cop from the original film returns to Los Angeles to help solve another case. This time he must direct his efforts towards unraveling the Alphabet Crimes, a series of robberies committed by leather-jacketed punks. The investigation puts him on the trail of an illegal arms dealer and his hit lady.

programme.title: Mamma Mia!
programme.desc: Set on a Greek island, a young woman who is about to be married suspects that any one of three men could be her father. She invites them all to her wedding without telling her mother. Movie adaptation of the musical, set to Abba's greatest hits.

programme.title: Mamma Mia! Here We Go Again
programme.desc: In 1979 Donna falls in love with Sam while embarking on a series of adventures throughout Europe. In the present day, Donna's pregnant daughter reunites with her mother's old friends and boyfriends on the Greek island of Kalokairi.

programme.title: American Pie 2
programme.desc: Action-packed sequel in which a group of friends are reunited after their freshman year of college and embark upon a series of comical adventures when they rent a summer house on Lake Michigan.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: Axel Foley and his Beverly Hills buddies investigate criminal activities at a Southern California amusement park.

programme.title: American Pie: The Wedding
programme.desc: Jim and Michelle are getting married and Jim struggles to win over his future in-laws and deal with his embarrassing dad. Meanwhile, Stifler isn't invited to the ceremony, but he's determined not to be left out.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: The story of a pair of blues musicians who try to raise the money to save an orphanage by reuniting their old band - nearly writing off Chicago in the process.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason
programme.desc: Bridget's brand new relationship with Darcy has taken a plummet due to her jealousy of his workmate. Having previously left the publishing house she worked for to avoid her boss, Daniel, with whom she had an unsuccessful romance, she finds him along for the ride on her new job, which takes her to Thailand, and almost into his arms.

programme.title: Babes
programme.desc: Pregnant from a one-night-stand, Eden leans on her best friend and mother of two, Dawn, to guide her through gestation and beyond.

programme.title: Police Academy 3: Back in Training
programme.desc: Slapstick farce with the incompetent cops as they set about saving their beloved academy from closure. Cutbacks mean that only one of the two police training schools can stay open, so Commandant Lassard appeals to the motley crew of graduates to come and train new recruits. However, the rival academy intends to sabotage their plans by cutting their training time down to a minimum.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: ...And Justice for All
programme.desc: Satirical drama in which an idealistic lawyer who tries to win cases for clients trapped in a hypocritical and corrupt legal system finds himself defending a venal and self-righteous judge accused of rape. The judge wrongly assumes the lawyer's ideals and disdain for the courts will drive him to get an acquittal, despite the evidence and the loathing they have for each other.

programme.title: Wish You Were Here
programme.desc: When a perfect night with a perfect stranger ends suddenly the next morning, Charlotte searches for answers and meaning in her life. However, she soon uncovers a shocking secret that changes everything she knows about the man who captured her heart.

programme.title: Widow Clicquot
programme.desc: The story behind the Veuve Clicquot champagne family and business that began in the late 18th century.

programme.title: The Cut
programme.desc: Given one last shot at glory, a former boxing champion has just six days to make weight for a title fight. His obsession soon leaves him at the mercy of a notorious trainer who takes every last ounce from his mind, body and soul.

programme.title: A Mistake
programme.desc: A surgeon allows her young colleague to take charge during a surgery. When a mistake occurs, the surgeon finds herself in a difficult situation.

programme.title: Escape to Victory
programme.desc: When ex-German international and camp commandant Van Steiner suggests a match between the POWs and the Germans, it swiftly escalates into a propaganda exercise.

programme.title: The Shawshank Redemption
programme.desc: Andy Dufresne and Ellis Boyd `Red' Redding are two prisoners serving long sentences in the vicious Shawshank jail. The two come to terms with their imprisonment while surviving the sadistic acts of prison warden Samuel Norton, and for both, a different sort of redemption awaits.

programme.title: Cast Away
programme.desc: Following a man's bid for survival on a desert island following a plane crash. An employee of Fedex snatches a few days between flights with his loving family and fiancée, to whom he proposes, before rushing off on his next assignment. However, his plane crashes during a storm and over the next four years he must train himself to survive away from civilisation.

programme.title: One Battle After Another
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of paranoia, surviving off-grid with his daughter, Willa. When his nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her while battling the consequences of his past.

programme.title: Anora
programme.desc: Anora, a sex worker from Brooklyn, gets her chance at a Cinderella story when she meets and marries the son of an oligarch. Once the news reaches Russia, her fairytale is threatened as the parents set out for New York to get the marriage annulled.

programme.title: The Room Next Door
programme.desc: Ingrid and Martha became close friends while working together at the same magazine. After years of being out of touch, they meet again in an extreme but strangely sweet situation.

programme.title: Wish You Were Here
programme.desc: When a perfect night with a perfect stranger ends suddenly the next morning, Charlotte searches for answers and meaning in her life. However, she soon uncovers a shocking secret that changes everything she knows about the man who captured her heart.

programme.title: Wish You Were Here
programme.desc: When a perfect night with a perfect stranger ends suddenly the next morning, Charlotte searches for answers and meaning in her life. However, she soon uncovers a shocking secret that changes everything she knows about the man who captured her heart.

programme.title: Free Willy
programme.desc: A heart-warming tale about a troubled young boy and his friendship with a captive orca whale named Willy. On bad terms with his new foster parents and set to work in an aquarium under court order, the boy turns to the whale for companionship. When he uncovers a cruel plot by its owner to kill the whale in order to claim a big insurance payout, the lad becomes determined to save Willy's life and release him back into the wild.

programme.title: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Following the adventures of Yang who is a successor in to a long line of Avatars. He has to put aside his childhood in order to stop he Fire Nation from enslaving the Water, Earth and Air nations.

programme.title: Mouse Hunt
programme.desc: Slapstick tale which follows the misfortunes of two hard-up brothers whose plans to renovate and sell a valuable building are jeopardised by a rogue mouse. The brothers soon find themselves pulling out all the stops in order to evict their tiny resident.

programme.title: Open Season
programme.desc: Stranded in the wilderness, a mule deer and a domesticated bear try to make their way back to the safety of a town preserve before a hunter catches them.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Four unlikely warriors rise from the sewers and join forces with fearless reporter April O'Neil to save New York from Shredder and his evil minions.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows
programme.desc: The turtles spring into action to battle Shredder, mad scientist Baxter Stockman, Bebop, Rocksteady and the notorious Krang.

programme.title: Sing
programme.desc: A pig, a mouse, a porcupine, a gorilla, an elephant and other animals gather at a koala's theatre for a singing competition.

programme.title: Chicken Run
programme.desc: Award-winning DreamWorks animation from the Aardman team, telling the story of a band of chickens doomed to a life of egg-laying on a Yorkshire chicken farm. When a flamboyant American rooster arrives on the scene, the hens hope he can teach them to fly to freedom. However, when a chicken-pie making machine is installed, their need becomes urgent and they must devise other means of escape.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit 2
programme.desc: Despite his efforts, Peter can't seem to shake his reputation for mischief among the other rabbits. Once he adventures out of the garden Peter finds himself in a world where mischief is appreciated, but soon his family come to bring him home.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Four unlikely warriors rise from the sewers and join forces with fearless reporter April O'Neil to save New York from Shredder and his evil minions.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows
programme.desc: The turtles spring into action to battle Shredder, mad scientist Baxter Stockman, Bebop, Rocksteady and the notorious Krang.

programme.title: Mouse Hunt
programme.desc: Slapstick tale which follows the misfortunes of two hard-up brothers whose plans to renovate and sell a valuable building are jeopardised by a rogue mouse. The brothers soon find themselves pulling out all the stops in order to evict their tiny resident.

programme.title: The Tuxedo
programme.desc: An ordinary cabbie uses gadget-laden formal wear to combat a villain who wants to poison the world's water supply.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview

programme.title: The Towering Inferno
programme.desc: At the opening party of a colossal, but poorly constructed office building, a massive fire breaks out that threatens to destroy the tower and everyone in it.

programme.title: Patriot Games
programme.desc: While visiting London with his family, Jack Ryan foils an IRA attempt to assassinate a government minister, killing one of the attackers in the process. Swearing vengeance, the IRA's Sean Miller follows Ryan and his family to their seaside home in America where he and his followers plan to exact their revenge.

programme.title: The Firm
programme.desc: A young lawyer joins a small but prestigious law firm only to find out that most of their clients are on the wrong side of the law. The company is helping to launder mob money, get clients off charges and even murder partners who threaten to blow their cover, but when the FBI come calling to gather evidence on the lawyer's colleagues, he is caught between a rock and a hard place, juggling his life and his liberty.

programme.title: The Towering Inferno
programme.desc: At the opening party of a colossal, but poorly constructed office building, a massive fire breaks out that threatens to destroy the tower and everyone in it.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: The curse of an ancient mummy protects buried treasure in the Egyptian desert. An American mercenary who knows of the secret location is rescued from a Cairo prison by an English historian and her brother, and together they set off on a hunt. Along the way, the trio encounter flesh-eating scarab beetles, killer sandstorms, and reincarnated demons.

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: In an attempt to avenge the violent death of his parents, Bruce Wayne fights to rid the city of crime and in particular, his nemesis the Joker. However, his defences come down when an attractive journalist tries to track down the truth behind sightings of a huge bat-like figure in the sky.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Dr Richard Kemble's wife is murdered and he is arrested for the crime. He soon realises he has been framed, and while being transported on a prison bus, he manages to escape. On the run, he has to evade the relentless pursuit by the US Marshall, Samuel Gerard, while also avoiding everyone he knows, and finding out who the real killer is, the one-armed man who broke into their house.

programme.title: Batman Returns
programme.desc: After Selina Kyle sees more than she should in her boss's office, she has an `accident', falling from the top floor of the building to the street below. Awoken by the licking of cats, she is surprised to find herself still very much alive. She vows to take revenge on her boss and becomes a female avenger, defending women under attack and providing assistance to Batman's efforts to keep the streets of Gotham safe.

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: Effects-laden blockbuster about a huge reptile which emerges from the sea to wreak havoc in Manhattan. On a research trip to Chernobyl, a young scientist discovers a startling link between genetic mutation and radioactivity. When a fishing trawler is attacked by an unseen creature, and other evidence of a massive reptilian creature is unearthed, he realises that the creature is following a destructive path to New York.

programme.title: Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: A desperate and crazed man, with the help of an accomplice, takes a local Brooklyn bank hostage with plans to rob it in order to pay for his lover's sex-change operation.

programme.title: The Abyss - Rise and Fall of the Nazis

programme.title: The UnXplained: Mysteries of the Universe

programme.title: Secrets In The Dark
programme.desc: Uncovers intriguing discoveries that threaten to shatter our understanding of the past. Each new discovery confronts our fascination, and fear, for what is hidden, illuminating the darkest recesses of history.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Throughout the ancient world, structures were built to mirror the constellations in the night sky and this is only apparent when they are viewed from high above. A look at the possibility that these structures were designed as messages.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: In an emotional tribute, witnesses and victims' relatives look back on the tragic murder of 16 children and a teacher at Dunblane Primary School, 15 years ago.

Secrets Declassified With David Duchovny
programme.desc: Step inside hidden areas where history was steered in secret, from Churchill's wartime bunker, complete with a direct line to FDR concealed inside his private bathroom, to a Soviet weapons base in the desert exposed only by a daring U-2 spy mission.

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Forged with Steele
programme.desc: A look at the creation of various weapons used in combat.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: In the final episode Dr Alice Roberts goes in search of the Tudor age, a time that saw momentous changes across all aspects of British life. Along the way Alice visits excavations at Shakespeare's first theatre in London's Shoreditch, where the Bard began his career and `Romeo and Juliet' was first performed. Alice also joins a team sifting through Shakespeare's rubbish at his last home in Stratford-Upon-Avon.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Focusing on Roman Britannia, where finds include the thickening mystery of 97 baby skeletons found by the Thames, a newly discovered town in rural Devon that turns history on its head, and a Roman cult figure buried for 1700 years beneath a fort.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Dr Alice Roberts travels back to the Viking Age in Britain and visits excavations that are revealing a different side to these seafaring pirates from Scandinavia. She looks for signs of the earliest Viking settlers in the Outer Hebrides, and in Orkney - where Viking dominance outlasted anywhere else in Britain - she visits the excavation of a Viking chief's citadel and finds evidence of their way-of-life.

programme.desc: It's the end of November in the Luangwa Valley, and the rains have just begun. It marks the end of one of the toughest dry season on record, and triggers a transition from parched wilderness to luscious wetland.

programme.title: Waterworld Africa
programme.sub-title: The Okavango: Lifeblood of the Kalahari
programme.desc: Take a look at one of Africa's most abundant and diverse wildlife areas, the Okavango Delta. Investigate the way the delta functions and learn about the variety of interesting species that live in the area.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Concerns for chimp Jestah who has a lump on his jaw. Lemurs Fennel and Ben trial life with the guenons but youngster Biff proves a bit full on.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: The large playroom at the orangutan nursery is a hit with youngsters Kiwi and Sibu, while chimp Clin gets a manicure for safety rather than appearance.

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: `Class Clown' Valentino is busy showing off, and the staff decide that `Big Boy' Beni needs to lose weight. Teenage mum Clara and her baby Clarita face a return to island life and they welcome a new pupil: Alba, the only reported albino orangutan.

programme.title: Valley of Flood and Fire
programme.desc: It's the end of November in the Luangwa Valley, and the rains have just begun. It marks the end of one of the toughest dry season on record, and triggers a transition from parched wilderness to luscious wetland.

programme.title: Zambia Untamed
programme.desc: The plains and woodlands of the Luangwa Valley are the wildest and most merciless of all neighbourhoods where duels between predator and prey are played out both day and night. For the animals that call this home, it's a daily battle to stay alive.

programme.title: Into the Wild Colombia
programme.desc: From Colombia's high plains of the Páramo to its tropical forests, hummingbirds have evolved into an extraordinary number of species. Whether battling freezing rain or jungle predators, each mother must struggle to build a nest, protect her eggs.

programme.title: Secrets of Wild Australia
programme.desc: This wild dog has been on Australia's shores for at least three and a half thousand years and is believed to be descended from the Asian wolf.

programme.title: Waterworld Africa
programme.desc: Living on the southwestern tip of Africa is an unusual colony of African penguins. Most African penguins prefer to breed on off-shore islands in the region, but human interference on their island homes has caused many birds to look elsewhere.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: There's a tasty treat of corn for the chimps but Bart and his troop miss out and the new lemur boys get to experience life in the trees at Malagasy.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Orangutan Amy becomes a great-grandmother as Awan and Jin welcome a baby boy. While there's more baby news for the newly released doucs and gibbons in Vietnam.

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: Vet Arga rescues an orphaned one-year-old orangutan with a broken wrist. Meanwhile, Beni attempts Jungle School's biggest ever banana heist and five adult orangutans are released into the wild.

programme.title: Valley of Flood and Fire
programme.desc: It's the end of November in the Luangwa Valley, and the rains have just begun. It marks the end of one of the toughest dry season on record, and triggers a transition from parched wilderness to luscious wetland.

programme.title: Zambia Untamed
programme.desc: As the dry season begins, thousands of animals are making their way to the Acacia Loop. Each must establish their place in the pecking order and avoid the dangerous residents who are all too willing to make a meal of the unwary.

programme.title: Into the Wild Colombia
programme.desc: The flat savannas of the Colombian Llanos are governed by seasonal extremes that push life to the brink. In this unforgiving arena, there are no second chances, and only creatures best adapted to their brutal extremes will make it through a year.

programme.title: Secrets of Wild Australia
programme.desc: Lurking in waterways of Queensland and the Northern Territory live the largest reptiles on Earth.

programme.title: Untamed Valley
programme.desc: The Big Bend is over two miles long and meanders along the Luangwa River in Zambia. It's a busy spot, home to a pod of hippos who luxuriate in its deep pools, an important crossing point for elephants and place to drink for huge herds of buffalo.

programme.title: Tales from Zambia
programme.desc: The wilds of Zambia are a tough place to live. Here, many animals must come together in groups to help defend territory, protect offspring, find food and overcome predators.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The team visit Croxteth Hall, a massive Victorian house surrounded by a modern council estate in Liverpool that is allegedly haunted. Spectral figures have appeared on CCTV security footage of the grounds.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Television presenter and avid `Most Haunted' viewer Gaby Roslin joins in Cheshire. As events escalate to a chilling finale, a curious combination of baths, bees and books ensure that their stay is far from pleasant.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and Derek Acorah conduct more chilling paranormal investigations as they visit the Black Swan Hotel in Devizes. As the attacks spread to a local boating lake, Cutter receives a mysterious message drawing him back into the past in search of his long-lost wife.

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: Helen Cutter uses the opening of a new anomaly to escape from custody at the Home Office, leaving in her wake a flock of dodos. As Abby desperately tries to evade Tom's lethal bite, the others try to track him down before a pandemic is unleashed.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding, Derek Acorah and a team of paranormal experts visit West Wycombe Caves, home of the notorious Hell Fire Club, which organised satanic rituals and orgies. A girl died there after a cruel joke went wrong and is said wander the caves in a Victorian wedding dress.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The team visit Mary Kings Close, a 17th-century building built over the top of older streets and houses. Many of its residents died of the plague and a fire raged in 1750 - a child's head, a severed arm and a little girl in a blue dress are just some of the apparitions reported.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: A warm welcome awaits the team across the Irish Sea, but as night falls and the lights go out at Kinnitty Castle, a series of startling and eerie events shake and scare every screaming member of the crew one by one.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: For centuries, Castle Leslie has been a family home. Who still haunts it, and why won't they leave? As they attempt to make contact, the `Most Haunted' team are shocked and amazed at the response they receive from beyond the grave.

programme.title: Pyaasa

A young prostitute, Gulab, finds Vijay's poems and is struck by their brilliance as a chance meeting brings them together. She falls in love with him but Vijay is still emotionally attached to Meena, who rejected his love.

programme.desc: Police Inspector Shekhar Varma lives in Khar, Bombay, along with his wife, Meena, and a school-going daughter. His office is notified that editor Ritesh Nandy has received death threats as he comes across evidence that would expose some very influential people.

programme.title: The Card

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Eleanor and Rob from Hereford would love an eco-friendly garden for themselves and their two daughters to enjoy. Of primary importance to the couple is that their garden is low/no carbon and that it is friendly to the environment. They would like the garden build to be based on a `circular economy' ie. any carbon spent would be offset by reusing materials. They want lots of habitats for birds, butterflies and bees and to use as many natural materials as possible.

programme.title: Love Your Garden
